refs.description: Clean, well-documented JavaScript implementation of DFS with callbacks for entering/leaving vertices and edges.
Reference recursive and iterative DFS implementations in Python with an adjacency-list graph.
NetworkX's production DFS module providing dfs_edges, dfs_tree, dfs_preorder_nodes, and dfs_postorder_nodes used throughout the library.
CPython's standard-library topological sorter performs a depth-first traversal to detect cycles and order nodes.
